creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
12.1-p10 amd64.

===>  Installing for gnome-video-effects-0.5.0
===>  Checking if gnome-video-effects is already installed
===>   Registering installation for gnome-video-effects-0.5.0 as automatic
pkg-static: Unable to access file /tmp/work/usr/ports/graphics/gnome-video-effects/work/stage/usr/local/libdata/pkgconfig/gnome-video-effects.pc:No such file or directory
*** Error code 74

It exist, but in another directory:
# find /tmp/work/usr/ports/graphics/gnome-video-effects/work -name '*.pc'
/tmp/work/usr/ports/graphics/gnome-video-effects/work/gnome-video-effects-0.5.0/_build/gnome-video-effects.pc
/tmp/work/usr/ports/graphics/gnome-video-effects/work/stage/usr/local/share/pkgconfig/gnome-video-effects.pc
